title: hieracium olivaceum subsp. lividulum
intro: Hieracium olivaceum subsp. lividulum, also known as livid hawk's beard, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. The plant has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of livid hawk's beard include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, including digestive issues and skin problems.
